title: Shoals Technologies Group Inc (SHLS) Q4 2025 Earnings Preview
text: Shoals Technologies is scheduled to report Q4 2025 earnings on February 24, 2026. Analysts expect quarterly revenue of $145.37 million with earnings per share of $0.12. For the complete fiscal year 2025, consensus estimates project revenue of $471.89 million and earnings of $0.27 per share. Over the past 90 days, full-year revenue estimates have remained relatively stable, declining marginally from $472.10 million to $471.89 million. However, 2026 earnings projections have improved, rising from $0.43 to $0.44 per share. In Q3 2025, SHLS exceeded revenue expectations by beating estimates of $130.88 million with actual revenue of $135.80 million. However, earnings disappointed, coming in at $0.07 per share versus the expected $0.10—a significant 31% miss that triggered a 10.64% stock decline. GuruFocus has flagged 9 Warning Signs with SHLS, signaling investor caution. The average analyst price target sits at $10.61, suggesting limited near-term upside, though the estimated fair value implies potential 11% appreciation.
